description: Application settings: language, appearance (theme), editor toggles, AI toggles, profile display name — only via safe allowlisted keys.
detection_hint: settings, preference, language, theme, editor width, spellcheck, autosave, GPU, RAG, profile name

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Settings tools: use list_settings to discover keys. Only use get_setting/set_setting/reset_setting for catalog keys. Never guess paths or internal keys.
